title: Software Update - DFU is not available if phone's battery is below 30%
scenario: DFU is blocked with misleading battery pop-up when phone battery is below 30% on Settings page
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure the phone battery is below 30%.
3. Navigate to Device Settings for the connected Poly Bluetooth device.
4. Attempt to trigger a Device Firmware Update (DFU) or language change.
expected: A pop-up appears stating the device battery doesn't have enough power to update. Tapping OK dismisses the pop-up and the user remains on the Settings page without the DFU starting.
